---
title: "Tree Database"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header: |
      <script>
      function redirectToTree(event) {
        event.preventDefault();
        const treeNumber = document.getElementById('treeNumber').value;
        if (treeNumber) {
          window.location.href = `/trees/${treeNumber}.html`;
        }
      }
      </script>
---

# Nature Discovery Garden Trees

Enter a tree number to view detailed information about that specific tree in our collection.

::: {style="max-width: 400px; margin: 2rem 0;"}
<form id="treeForm" onsubmit="redirectToTree(event)">
<div style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
<label for="treeNumber" style="display: block; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; font-weight: bold;">Tree Number:</label>
<input type="number" id="treeNumber" name="treeNumber" min="1" required style="width: 100%; padding: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 1rem;">
</div>
<button type="submit" style="background-color: #007bff; color: white; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 1rem;">
View Tree
</button>
</form>
:::

---

*The tree database contains detailed information about individual trees in the Nature Discovery Garden, including species identification, planting history, and measurement data.*
